title: Replace synthetic verification bundle with People Tech delivery
acceptance: data/verification/ contains files exactly matching People Tech delivery (signed manifest)
loader's synthetic- guard relaxed or moved to env-flag
J100..J105 verified end-to-end with the real bundle.
verification_commands: Journey verifications J100..J105 reproduced against the People Tech bundle
no synthetic- placeholders remaining in data/verification/.
notes: Description: data/verification/ ships with synthetic prod-like fixtures (synthetic- credential prefix, @hilopeople.com emails, generated TOTP). When People Tech delivers the real prod-like bundle (per instrucciones §15), replace the JSON files in data/verification/ and the loader's defense-in-depth 'synthetic-' guard must be relocated or lifted under explicit human approval. Until then, journeys verify against the synthetic bundle, which is acceptable scaffolding but not the final productive contract.
